metadata.task_description: Create loosefruit duplicate deletion feature - scan PR_LOOSEFRUIT table where DocID contains underscore (duplicate suffix pattern), delete from all locations, add to Python/PySide6 desktop app with proper layout following existing UI patterns. SQL: SELECT TOP (1000) [ID],[DocID],[DocDate],[DocDesc],[LocCode],[AccMonth],[AccYear],[PhyMonth],[PhyYear],[Status],[CreatedBy],[CreatedDate],[UpdatedBy],[UpdatedDate],[ImpFlag],[AutoCalMT],[TotalMT] FROM [db_ptrj].[dbo].[PR_LOOSEFRUIT] WHERE [DocID] LIKE "%[_]%" ORDER BY [DocID];
